articles.title: Lauren Bennett, G.R.L. Member and Singer on LMFAO’s ‘Party Rock Anthem,’ Dead at 37
articles.summary: Lauren Bennett, the singer best known for her feature on the 2011 LMFAO hit song “Party Rock Anthem,” has died. She was 37.  Bennett’s bandmates in G.R.L. confirmed her death in a statement shared Monday, July 6. A cause of death was not given. “Our hearts are broken, and we cannot begin to express how much she […] The post Lauren Bennett, G.R.L. Member and Singer on LMFAO’s ‘Party Rock Anthem,’ Dead at 37 appeared first on Rolling Stone India .
